name: delete_qor_ruledeck
full_help:
delete_qor_ruledeck

Description: 
Delete a user QoR ruledeck

Syntax: 
delete_qor_ruledeck  [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>      Name of QoR ruledeck to delete

Categories: 
Object, Feasibility, Timing

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
